title: 好像是停电了
description_uz: «Chiroq nega to'satdan o'chdi?» — Elektr o'chganda ikki do'st telefon fonarini yoqib, sham izlaydi, butun bino o'chganini tekshiradi va vaqtni o'tkazish uchun suhbatlashadi. Bu dialog holatni tasvirlash, buyum joyini so'rash va reja tuzishni mashq qiladi. Uy-ro'zg'or so'zlariga boy. Rol o'ynash uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «Почему свет вдруг погас?» — При отключении электричества двое друзей включают фонарик телефона, ищут свечи, проверяют, весь ли дом обесточен, и болтают, чтобы скоротать время. Диалог тренирует описание ситуации, вопросы о том, где что лежит, и планирование. Богат бытовой лексикой. Отлично подходит для ролевой игры.
description_en: «Why did the light suddenly go out?» — During a power cut, two friends turn on a phone flashlight, look for candles, check whether the whole building is out, and chat to pass the time. The dialogue practices describing a situation, asking where things are, and making a plan. Rich in household vocabulary. Great for role-play.

sentences.text_translation_en: Why did the light suddenly go out?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好像是停电了，外面也全黑了。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎoxiàng shì tíngdiàn le, wàimiàn yě quán hēi le.
sentences.text_translation: Chamasi, elektr o'chib qoldi, tashqarida ham hamma yoq qorong'i.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Кажется, отключили электричество, на улице тоже всё темно.
sentences.text_translation_en: Looks like the power's out — it's all dark outside too.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你手机有电吗？快照一下。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shǒujī yǒu diàn ma? Kuài zhào yíxià.
sentences.text_translation_ru: У тебя телефон заряжен? Быстро посвети.
sentences.text_translation_en: Is your phone charged? Shine some light quick.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 有，手电筒打开了，小心脚下。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu, shǒudiàntǒng dǎkāi le, xiǎoxīn jiǎoxià.
sentences.text_translation: Bor, fonarni yoqdim, oyog'ingga ehtiyot bo'l.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, фонарик включил, смотри под ноги.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah, flashlight's on — watch your step.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen zhè dòng lóu dōu tíng le ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: У нас во всём доме отключили?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 应该是，邻居家的灯也不亮。
sentences.pinyin: Yīnggāi shì, línjū jiā de dēng yě bú liàng.
sentences.text_translation: Shekilli shunday, qo'shnining chirog'i ham yonmayapti.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Наверное, у соседей свет тоже не горит.
sentences.text_translation_en: Probably — the neighbors' lights are off too.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 蜡烛放在哪儿？抽屉里吗？
sentences.pinyin: Làzhú fàng zài nǎr? Chōuti lǐ ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Where are the candles? In the drawer?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对，左边第二个抽屉，我去拿。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, zuǒbiān dì-èr ge chōuti, wǒ qù ná.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, chap tomondagi ikkinchi tortmada, men olib kelaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, во втором ящике слева, я схожу возьму.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes, the second drawer on the left — I'll go get them.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Tíngdiàn le shénme dōu zuò bu liǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Elektr o'chganda hech narsa qilib bo'lmaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Когда нет света, ничего не сделать.
sentences.text_translation_en: With the power out, you can't do anything.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 是啊，Wi-Fi也没了，电视也看不了。
sentences.pinyin: Shì a, Wi-Fi yě méi le, diànshì yě kàn bu liǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, Wi-Fi ham yo'q, televizor ham ko'rib bo'lmaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, и Wi-Fi пропал, и телевизор не посмотреть.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah — no Wi-Fi either, and can't watch TV.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那我们聊会儿天吧，好久没这样了。
sentences.pinyin: Nà wǒmen liáo huìr tiān ba, hǎojiǔ méi zhèyàng le.
sentences.text_translation: Unda bir oz suhbatlashaylik, ancha vaqt bo'ldi bunday qilmaganimizga.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда давай поболтаем, давно так не сидели.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then let's chat for a while — it's been a long time.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 也好，平时大家都看手机。
sentences.pinyin: Yě hǎo, píngshí dàjiā dōu kàn shǒujī.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi bo'ladi, odatda hamma telefoniga qaraydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тоже неплохо, обычно все сидят в телефонах.
sentences.text_translation_en: Good idea — usually everyone's just on their phones.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: No idea when the power will come back.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 物业说大概半小时，等等吧。
sentences.pinyin: Wùyè shuō dàgài bàn xiǎoshí, děngdeng ba.
sentences.text_translation: Boshqaruv xizmati taxminan yarim soat dedi, kutaylik.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Управляющая компания сказала примерно полчаса, подождём.
sentences.text_translation_en: Property management said about half an hour — let's wait.
sentences.speaker: B
